_meta.purpose: Validation test vectors for pipeline regression testing

patients.clinical_remarks: Patient presents with full Rotterdam triad. Elevated androgens with clinical hirsutism. LH/FSH inversion confirmed.
patients.query: What is the dominant endocrine axis dysfunction driving hyperandrogenism and cycle irregularity in this patient?

patients.clinical_remarks: Dominant metabolic presentation. Severe insulin resistance with prediabetic glucose. Androgen levels borderline. Reproductive axis mildly suppressed.
patients.query: Is the primary driver of cycle disruption in this patient metabolic or reproductive in origin?

patients.clinical_remarks: All markers within normal reference ranges. Included as negative control to validate pipeline specificity.
patients.query: Confirm absence of PCOS-axis dysfunction and identify any subclinical risk markers.
